recommendations.title: Destroyer
recommendations.overview: When Erin Bell was a young cop, she was given an undercover assignment that ended badly and destroyed her life. Years later, she must face her demons in order to make peace with her past.

recommendations.title: The Invitation
recommendations.overview: Will and his new girlfriend Kira are invited to a dinner with old friends at the house of Will’s ex Eden and her new partner David. Although the evening appears to be relaxed, Will soon gets a creeping suspicion that their charming host David is up t

recommendations.title: Jennifer's Body
recommendations.overview: Jennifer, a gorgeous, seductive cheerleader takes evil to a whole new level after she's possessed by a sinister demon. Now it's up to her best friend to stop Jennifer's reign of terror before it's too late.

recommendations.title: XX
recommendations.overview: This all-female horror anthology features four dark tales from four fiercely talented women.
recommendations.director: Roxanne Benjamin, St. Vincent, Jovanka Vuckovic, Karyn Kusama

recommendations.title: Æon Flux
recommendations.overview: 400 years into the future, disease has wiped out the majority of the world's population, except one walled city, Bregna, ruled by a congress of scientists. When Æon Flux, the top operative in the underground 'Monican' rebellion, is sent on a mission

recommendations.title: Donnie Darko
recommendations.overview: After narrowly escaping a bizarre accident, a troubled teenager is plagued by visions of a large bunny rabbit that manipulates him to commit a series of crimes.

recommendations.title: Diana: In Her Own Words
recommendations.overview: Using home videos recorded by her voice coach, Diana takes us through the story of her life.

recommendations.title: First Match
recommendations.overview: Hardened by years in foster care, a teenage girl from Brooklyn’s Brownsville neighborhood decides that wrestling boys is the only way back to her estranged father.

recommendations.title: The Fighter
recommendations.overview: Boxer "Irish" Micky Ward's unlikely road to the world light welterweight title. His Rocky-like rise was shepherded by half-brother Dicky, a boxer-turned-trainer who rebounded in life after nearly being KO'd by drugs and crime.

recommendations.title: Aftersun
recommendations.overview: Sophie reflects on the shared joy and private melancholy of a holiday she took with her father twenty years earlier. Memories fill the gaps between camcorder footages as she tries to reconcile the father she knew with the troubled man she didn't.
